rows.name: mcp-server-time

This is NOT a benign verdict — it means MIS did not recognize the SDK pattern in use (see LIMITATIONS.md L13 for the SDKs currently covered). Treat this server as unanalyzed until: (a) a manual review is performed, (b) MIS supp

rows.name: mcp-server-fetch
rows.label: benign
rows.verdict_reason: Tools were detected (1) but MIS extracted ZERO behavior signals from any of them — not even PURE_COMPUTE. This means the analyzer recognized the tool names but failed to follow ANY of their implementation logic — typically because tool bodies route through class methods (L18), helpers across modules
